announcements.title: sf-pi v0.52.0 — migrate pi peer-dep scope from @mariozechner to @earendil-works (pi 0.74)
announcements.body: migrate pi peer-dep scope from @mariozechner to @earendil-works (pi 0.74) — migrate pi peer-dep scope from @mariozechner to @earendil-works (pi 0.74)

announcements.title: sf-pi requires pi 0.73 or newer
announcements.body: Current sf-pi builds require pi 0.73 or newer. Run `pi update` before upgrading sf-pi; PI_CODING_AGENT_SESSION_DIR remains supported for relocating session storage.
